name: How local should my pages be for voice search in Austin or Denver?
description: Be specific but natural. Mention the neighborhoods and service areas you באמת serve, without stuffing city names into every sentence.

mainEntity.name: How local should my pages be for voice search in Austin or Denver?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, include neighborhood names and service areas only where they are true and useful. For example, a page can mention the parts of town you actually serve, but it should still read naturally.
acceptedAnswer.description: Be specific but natural. Mention the neighborhoods and service areas you באמת serve, without stuffing city names into every sentence.
